scripts.build: npm run build -w @itharbors/mysql-contracts && npm run build -w @itharbors/relationship-graph && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-core && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-cli && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/mysql-core && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/mysql-data && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/mysql-explorer && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/mysql-relationships && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/mysql-schema && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/mysql-sql
